objective: Tune a constrained engineering design artifact. Maximize simulated efficiency while satisfying hard safety constraints.

static_files.evaluate.py:
import json
p=json.load(open('design.json'))
mat=p.get('material')
th=float(p.get('wall_thickness_mm', 0.0))
channels=int(p.get('cooling_channels', 0))
angle=float(p.get('inlet_angle_deg', 0.0))
safety=float(p.get('safety_factor', 0.0))
feasible=1.2 <= safety <= 2.5 and 3.0 <= th <= 12.0 and 1 <= channels <= 8 and 10 <= angle <= 70 and mat in ['titanium','steel','aluminum']
mat_bonus={'titanium':14,'steel':7,'aluminum':3}.get(mat,-12)
score=60+mat_bonus
score+=channels*5 - max(0, channels-5)*8
score-=abs(th-5.2)*4.5
score-=abs(angle-42)*0.55
score-=abs(safety-1.35)*12
if channels >= 5 and th < 4.8:
    feasible=False
    score-=25
if not feasible:
    score-=60
json.dump({'objective':round(score,4),'feasible':feasible,'metrics':{'material':mat,'wall_thickness_mm':th,'cooling_channels':channels,'inlet_angle_deg':angle,'safety_factor':safety},'cost':{'eval_calls':1,'sim_seconds':0.02}}, open('score.json','w'))
